Localization.Description: Attempt to transfer a DNS zone to a host that is not in the List_Servers or AssetGrid_Servers list. This can lead to the disclosure of the internal structure of the network.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed attempt to transfer DNS zone {object.value} to untrusted host {src.host} from the dnsmasq DNS server on host {event_src.host}
DNS zone {object.value} was transferred to untrusted host {src.host} from the dnsmasq DNS server on host {event_src.host}
